title: EDN55 CANCELLED Calculation of Cannabis Duty and Additional Cannabis Duty on Cannabis Products - Canada.ca
content:
## EDN55 CANCELLED Calculation of Cannabis Duty and Additional Cannabis Duty on Cannabis Products

## This publication was cancelled
This publication was cancelled as of 2025-03-19 and replaced by Memorandum EDM6-3, Imposition and payment of duty on cannabis products .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
